---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear and concise description of the problem. E.g. "I always have to manually call `persistTurn` when…"

**Proposed solution**
Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible — a rough API shape, option name, or constructor flag helps a lot.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else that might be helpful (links, prior art, screenshots).
